name: api_nano_banana_pro_1img
description: Google Gemini 3 Pro Image (a.k.a. Nano Banana Pro) via the GeminiImage2Node API node — single-reference variant. Takes one reference image plus a text prompt and returns a composited image. Aspect ratio and resolution are baked into the workflow (1:1 at 1K by default) — edit the template JSON to change them. Runs via a Comfy Cloud API node (requires a configured API key).

prompt.description: Text instruction describing how the reference image should be transformed or posed.
